slides.description: Opening/cover slide with a large title and subtitle area. Branded background with SettleMint logo. Always the first slide of any deck.
slides.usage: Use as the very first slide of every presentation. Enter the deck title and subtitle (date, event name, presenter).
slides.potential_usage: Can also be used as a re-opening slide after a major break or change in speaker.

slides.potential_usage: Can also be used as a chapter divider in long workshop or training decks.

slides.description: Branded closing/thank you slide with CTA area. Matches the cover in branding. Always the last slide of any deck.
slides.usage: Use as the final slide. Include a call to action, contact information, or next steps. Title = 'Thank You' or equivalent.
slides.potential_usage: Can also be used as a Q&A invitation slide or a 'contact us' closing slide in sales contexts.
